titleStmt.title: SII 6.109: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 109. (A.R. No. 151 of 1897). ON THE SAME SLAB.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śakhava¨rṣaṁblu 998 nēṁṭi nalaśaṁvatsa
ra śrāhi svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrī
viṣnuva¨rddhanamahārājula prava¨rddhamā
na vijayarājyaśaṁvatsaThe letter tsa is engraved below the line.raṁblu 7 nēṇḍu śrīmatsa
mastanēnādhipati velanāṁṭigoṁkaya śrīmū
lasthānamahādēvaraku māghamāsamuna
punnamayu sukravāramuna sōmagrahaṇa
nimittamuna nakhaṇḍava¨rtti diviya yokkoṁṭikiṁ be
ṭṭina velleḍla yeṁbhadiyu I nimittamunana vīra
śrīkumārasvāmidēvaraku nakhaṇḍava¨rtti diviya
lu reṁṭikiṁ beṭṭina velleḍlu māṟunu vīniṁ jē
koni śantānakramamunaṁ gāci yācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
makhaṇḍava¨rttidiviyalu mūṁṭikiṁ gomma
bōyini koḍuku dikkiya mahāsēnamuna ni
tya mūṇḍu mānikalu neyi vōyaṁgalavāṇḍu . sē
brōli sthānapatiyunu munnū¨rvvuru Ayyalu mu
nnū[¨r*]vvuru sānuluṁ bratipāliṁpaṁgalavāru .
prakhyātai¨rvvasupadmayōninidhibhi śśākābdapiṇḍē mi
tē sōmasya grahaṇē parākramadhanaḥ prādātpra
dīpadvayaṁ . nityaṁ satyavibhūṣaṇassucari
taḥ prakhyātatējōnidhiḥ goṁkaśśaktidharāya
tārakabhidē ttrailōkyarakṣā¨rtthinē . mūlasthā
nanivāsinē bhagavatē dēvāya kāmārayē
prādāddīpamakhaṇḍamujvalayaśō yasyāṣṭa
dikpūritaṁ . sa krīḍādalitākhilārinicaya
śśiṣṭēṣṭarakṣāmaṇi¨rggoṁkaśśaṁkarakiṁkarō gu
ṇanidhi¨rgguṇḍāṁbikā nandanaḥ . candanācā¨ryyali
khitaṁ . vīra śrīkumārasvāmidēvarakuṁ jēyiṁcci
na yuramāla yokkoṁṭṭiki jayamāḍa 5 .
Digital edition of SII 6.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
